items.note: Use required_all for the cold-coffee notification with groups for the smart coffee mug, explicit notification language, and coffee is cold or coffee's cold. Add natural timing alternatives such as after I finished drinking and after I already finished. Do not allow a device buzz to substitute for the supplied notification.
Add I'm disappointed as an alternative to I am disappointed.
The request supplies one milestone, so allowed_numbers must contain the strings one and 1.
Replace the case-insensitive capitalized-name regex, which matches ordinary words, with explicit relationship terms and medical-detail terms.
